definition: Monetary fine or civil penalty imposed on a violating entity.
Criminal sanction including fines and imprisonment for willful violations.
Individual or class action lawsuit right to sue in civil court.
orrick_signal: private right of action, civil action, may sue

definition: Enforcement action brought by the state attorney general.
Enforcement by a specialized regulatory agency (not AG).
Administrative penalties including license revocation, cease-and-desist, consent decrees.
orrick_signal: administrative, cease and desist, consent order

definition: Court-ordered injunction to stop or compel a specific action.
Restitution or disgorgement of profits to harmed parties.
